dynamic_review_relevance: Ile1781Leu: direct-core CT dimer-interface position, near the cavity opening (Delye 2005); confers APP + some CHD resistance, catalytic activity unaltered. SWISS-MODEL residue is the weed wild-type Ile.
manuscript_interpretation: ACCase direct-interface benchmark, now using weed-model side-chain metrics.

dynamic_review_relevance: Ile2041Asn: the single ACCase substitution Delye 2005 modelled as directly interfering with herbicide binding (major steric clash with Phe2030); APP-selective. SWISS-MODEL residue is the weed wild-type Ile.
manuscript_interpretation: ACCase direct-contact benchmark (APP-selective), now using weed-model side-chain metrics.

dynamic_review_relevance: Asp2078Gly: bottom-of-cavity CT-domain position (Delye 2005); confers APP + CHD resistance including clethodim and reduces catalytic activity - a polar catalytic-pocket residue, not a direct herbicide contact.

Trp2027Cys: bottom-of-cavity CT-domain position (Delye 2005); APP-only resistance and reduced catalytic activity, consistent with a second-shell/catalytic-pocket role rather than direct herbicide contact.
Gly2096Ala: near-pocket CT-domain position (Delye 2005); an added methyl protrudes into the cavity, APP-only. SWISS-MODEL residue is the weed wild-type Gly.
manuscript_interpretation: Report as adjacent, APP-selective, now using weed-model side-chain metrics.

dynamic_review_relevance: Cys2088Arg (Yu 2007): most distal accepted ACCase position; APP + CHD incl clethodim. The SWISS-MODEL residue is the weed wild-type Cys; active-site-core membership is transferred from 1UYS H1L contacts because SWISS-MODEL excluded H1L.
manuscript_interpretation: Non-core candidate in the interface resistance zone; report with the transferred-core caveat.

dynamic_review_relevance: Ala122 is an established ALS dimer-interface pocket TSR site (Tranel & Wright 2002); the A. palmeri A122S allele (Larran 2017) co-occurs with A282D so its individual causality is not isolated - included with medium confidence.
manuscript_interpretation: Direct-interface ALS position; report with the A282D-confound caveat.

dynamic_review_relevance: Pro197 is one of the most firmly established ALS TSR sites across weeds (Tranel & Wright 2002); Pro197Ala detected in A. palmeri by Singh et al. 2018 (with Trp574Leu). Direct-core dimer-interface pocket position.
manuscript_interpretation: Direct-core ALS benchmark; note Singh's Pro197Ala co-occurs with Trp574Leu.

dynamic_review_relevance: Review agrees this is a direct pocket/contact example where static structural mapping is expected to work well.
Direct ALS pocket position; dynamic cross-resistance details are outside this static resource's prediction scope.

Pro106 is a glyphosate-binding-site-associated residue (Baerson 2002; corresponds to the Salmonella glyphosate-insensitive EPSPS substitution), not an allosteric site. Its 3.85 A CA distance sits just outside the 4.5 A atomic-contact core - a cutoff artifact, not evidence of allostery.
manuscript_interpretation: Treat as binding-site-adjacent / second-shell, not allosteric. EPSPS remains underpowered with one accepted position and is a mapped case study, not a family-level test.

dynamic_review_relevance: Direct active-site/core residue; static proximity is expected to be informative.
manuscript_interpretation: Use as direct-pocket benchmark for PPO substitutions.

dynamic_review_relevance: Adjacent non-core site where static proximity plus literature mechanism support a binding-pocket interpretation.
manuscript_interpretation: Use as a near-core PPO resistance benchmark.

dynamic_review_relevance: Review's loop/helix critique is relevant; Dayan/Hao literature describes a deletion-linked structural mechanism not reducible to distance alone.
manuscript_interpretation: Highlight as the flagship non-core mechanistic exception: close to the active-site zone but distinctive by helix/deletion effects.

dynamic_review_relevance: Static screen places this outside the immediate core, but mechanism remains unresolved and conservation is modest.
manuscript_interpretation: Keep as unresolved; do not overclaim dynamic mechanism without additional literature support.
